channel.title: NICAR 2026 Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Bluesky posts about the NICAR 2026 conference (#NICAR26, #NICAR2026)

item.title: The Word (@the-word.news)
item.description:
Today: #NICAR26 kicks off @ire.org’s 50th anniversary year
the-word.news/2026/0305/ni...

item.title: Steven Rich (@datab.ae)
item.description: we're not even through day 1 at #NICAR26 and i am fully EXHAUSTED

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: Want to find out more about analyzing text with R? At his #NICAR26 presentation, @robwells.bsky.social mentioned @juliasilge.com 's book www.tidytextmining.com Julia also has a free interactive online course juliasilge.com/blog/learn-t... #RStats His repo: github.com/profrobwells...

item.title: Jon Keegan (@jonkeegan.com)
item.description:
For our #NICAR26 panel we threw together this free, open-source glossary of AI terms and foundational concepts that journalists should know.
We will be adding to this! (Forked from prior work by @palewi.re @dwillis.bsky.social et al)
aiglossary.news

item.title: brentajones.bsky.social (@brentajones.bsky.social)
item.description: Unsurprisingly the “Data in the world of audio” panel has immaculate mic technique. #NICAR26

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Did you know that you could pitch a story to the IRE Journal? If you're at #NICAR26, go say hi to Adam Rhodes @byadamrhodes.bsky.social and tell them about your ideas!

item.title: Eileen Grench, OLY (@grenchpan.bsky.social)
item.description: There was a full house today at our #NICAR2026 panel today on how to use public records to report on immigration enforcement! Always excited to talk about @documentedny.bsky.social and how to get creative on the local immigration beat.

item.title: Jason Dean (@thed34n.bsky.social)
item.description: Man, I miss NICAR. Data journalism is kinda the best. #NICAR26

item.title: Jon Keegan (@jonkeegan.com)
item.description: Finish your lunch and come join us at 2:30! #nicar26

item.title: Emily Hopkins is at #NICAR26 (@emilyhopkins.bsky.social)
item.description: Some local flavor at #NICAR26: If you lunch at Patachou, you might see Indiana Secretary of State Diego Morales!

item.title: The Word (@the-word.news)
item.description:
We made it! Live from #NICAR26...
Plus: • trauma in journalism • starting a newsletter as a disabled journalist • going beyond quotes in articles • and how to get people to read to the end of your long-form piece
the-word.news

item.title: Jon Keegan (@jonkeegan.com)
item.description:
Hey #NICAR26! Coming up at 2:30pm @ryanserpi.co @libbyseline.bsky.social and I will be doing our panel “AI concepts you should know.”
We will walk you through some of the fundamental concepts of AI and explain the jargon you should know!
schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#... White River D, Level 1.

item.title: Hannah Recht (@hannahrecht.bsky.social)
item.description: most surprising factoid of #nicar26 so far: there are AI toilets 🤯

item.title: Reporters Committee for Freedom of the Press (@rcfp.org)
item.description: @rcfp.org is on the ground in Indianapolis for #NICAR26! Find us to chat about our free legal help for journalists and newsrooms, and check out our sessions on the schedule 👇

item.title: Amy Qin (@amyqin.bsky.social)
item.description:
Hey! I’m at #NICAR26. Say hi if you’re here too!
Also on a panel this afternoon at 3:45 — Data in the world of audio — with the wonderful @jjw.bsky.social @hannahereale.bsky.social @claytonguse.bsky.social
Come to learn about how to talk about data on air and make sound rich data features!

item.title: Brian C. Keegan, Ph.D. at NICAR26 (@brianckeegan.com)
item.description:
I used VoyageAI to embed #NICAR26 session titles and descriptions and visualized it using UMAP.
Check out the results in @datawrapper.de: www.datawrapper.de/_/maVs5/

item.title: Carla Astudillo at #NICAR26 (@carla-astudi.bsky.social)
item.description: Awesome database published by my @propublica.org colleagues where you can look up financial disclosures of over 1,500 of Trump's appointees. #NICAR26 data nerds will appreciate this one! projects.propublica.org/trump-team-f...

item.title: Marc Lajoie (@lajoiemedia.bsky.social)
item.description: Sounds like we need a Canadian version of NICAR

item.title: Sophie Chou (@sophiechou.bsky.social)
item.description: If you’re interested in learning more about how we did this story, @andreasuozzo.com and I are talking about it at #NICAR26

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: On seeking data about immigration enforcement in the US: "Every records request should start with reporting", Will Craft from the Guardian tells #NICAR26. Know what you should ask for, he advised. "You have to be very very very precise." In other words: Do a lot of work prior to filing a FOIA.

item.title: Mike Reilley (@mikereilley.bsky.social)
item.description:
Some links on The Journalist's Toolbox that are helpful for #nicar26 attendees:
Public documents: journaliststoolbox.ai/databases-pu...
Data viz tools: journaliststoolbox.ai/ai-driven-da...
Data scraping: journaliststoolbox.ai/scraping-too...
#ddj #dataviz #datajournalism

item.title: Derek Willis (@dwillis.bsky.social)
item.description: It's time for NICAR-India

item.title: ence morse (@ence.bsky.social)
item.description: It's NICAR season! I'm in Indy talking about our TikTok data collection project on Friday and midterm elections on Saturday. Come say hi!

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: Interesting takeaway via Duy Nguyen [NY TImes]: Various AI-based tools have different places in the journalism process. For ex. chatbots can be useful to get started and find story ideas; AI-powered semantic search is better if you have subject expertise & more targeted questions #NICAR26 #GenAI

item.title: Emily Hopkins is at #NICAR26 (@emilyhopkins.bsky.social)
item.description:
Hey #NICAR26: Mirror Indy's support organization, Free Press Indiana, is launching a new statewide reporting team. Which means we are hiring.
Hit me up if you want to chat about what it's like to work here!
www.freepressindiana.org/jobs/civic-a...

item.title: Liam Adams (@liamsadams.bsky.social)
item.description: Hey #NICAR26 @ire.org folks I’m here in Indy to improve my data and investigative reporting skills and find ways to integrate it better in religion reporting. If you’re interested in brainstorming more on religion reporting and data journalism, come find me!

item.title: MuckRock (@muckrock.com)
item.description: Investigative and Research Journalist Audrey Nielsen demoing how reporters can collect and use state ethics disclosures to report on public officials and candidates for office. #NICAR26

item.title: Aman Bhargava (@aman.bh)
item.description: Another NICAR, another year of FOMO. One day.

item.title: Patrick Garvin (@patrickmgarvin.bsky.social)
item.description:
If you're at @ire.org's NICAR, don't forget alt text on images you share in social media posts. If you're fuzzy on alt text best practices, @stacykess.bsky.social, @emiliaruzicka.bsky.social, and have a session tomorrow followed by another session where they will dig deeper.
#NICAR26 #NICAR2026

item.title: Karen K. Ho (@karenho.bsky.social)
item.description: multiple people have asked if I am at NICAR, which makes me a little sad, but so far everyone has understood I didn't attend this year due to security concerns

item.title: Lucia Walinchus (@walinchus.bsky.social)
Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: R folks listening to this morning's #NICAR26 session on extracting data from documents and - importantly! - how to check your results: You can set up and run evaluations of LLM results with the {vitals} #rstats 📦 www.infoworld.com/ar... #DDJ

item.title: Jon Keegan (@jonkeegan.com)
item.description: Keegans gonna NICAR! #nicar26

item.title: Will Craft (@wcraft.bsky.social)
item.description:
Hello, I am at #NICAR26, I'll be doing two panels on immigration reporting and a panel on hiring. Please come!
Immigration records: Thurs 10:15 at White River 1
Immigration data and how to make sense of it: Sat 11:30 at White River G
An honest convo about hiring: Sat 3:45 White River D

item.title: Chris Cioffi (@reportercioffi.bsky.social)
item.description: LDA news: Excited to lead my first #NICAR26 session today on LobbyR, an R package I developed that turns federal lobbying disclosures into structured data. It’s a lot easier with than using the site! Check it out on CRAN: cran.r-project.org/package=lobbyR schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

item.title: Brian C. Keegan, Ph.D. at NICAR26 (@brianckeegan.com)
item.description: Bald white Keegans unite at #NICAR26! Hi @jonkeegan.com 👋

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Each day at #NICAR26, we’ll have a different food truck on site and they’ll be fully covered from the rain. Here’s how to find it: Head to the first floor, find Ballroom F, and follow the food truck signs. They’ll lead you straight to the exit door that takes you outside to lunch.

item.title: Rashida Kamal (@rashida.bsky.social)
item.description: Who’s at NICAR this year? I want to nerd out with my peers ⚡️

item.title: Knight Lab (@knightlab.northwestern.edu)
item.description: We'll be at NICAR this week and would love to talk to you about your submission to our next cohort of data-driven projects. Deadline to apply is March 31.

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: This looks like it will be a very cool resource for data journalism ⬇️⬇️⬇️ You need to be an @ire.org member to access. Announced at the #NICAR26 data journalism conference #DDJ

item.title: Lisa Pickoff-White (@pickoffwhite.bsky.social)
item.description:
We’re discussing the Police Records Access Project at #NICAR26:
Thursday: Challenges with cross-domain collaboration, 3:45 Monitoring police accountability laws across the U.S. 5 Friday: Utilizing new police misconduct and employment databases, 9 Saturday: How to use AI responsibly, 2:30

item.title: Brad Skillman (@bradqskillman.bsky.social)
item.description: Are you ready for some NICAR!!!! #nicar26 #nicar2026

item.title: Moriarty Maps (@moriartymaps.com)
item.description: I'm at NICAR! Say hi if you're here too. Running an hour long workshop Saturday if you'd like to hear me gab about automated workflows and try out some for yourself. #nicar26

item.title: Jon Schleuss (@jschleuss.com)
item.description: Are you a union member or want to be and you're at #NICAR26? The Indy NewsGuild and @newsguild.org are sponsoring a happy hour tonight from 6-8pm downtown. (appetizers provided!)

item.title: Ben Welsh (@palewi.re)
item.description: The site, which launched today at #NICAR26, is powered by semantic search technology. That means it will use AI to match results based on the meaning of your words, not just exact keyword hits.

item.title: Mike Reilley (@mikereilley.bsky.social)
item.description: Resources from my #nicar26 session on "AI Tools That Won't Get You Fired" bit.ly/nicar26 #ddj #dataviz

item.title: Miska Knapek (@miskaknapek.bsky.social)
item.description:
One of the world's biggest investigative and data journalism #ddj conferences, starting today.
Usually quite amor of good tutorials and tips are shared via the hashtag #nicar26, and some session recordings surface later online
#datascience

item.title: Emilia Ruzicka (@emiliaruzicka.bsky.social)
item.description: Remember that time I did a #NICAR lightning talk about how medieval heraldry can teach us about how to make better data stories? Well, I made the lightning talk into a pre- #NICAR26 project! Go check it out! emiliaruzicka.com/LessonsInHer...

item.title: Brian C. Keegan, Ph.D. at NICAR26 (@brianckeegan.com)
item.description: Fun #NICAR26 fact, the schedule is stored as a JSON document: ire-nicar-conference-schedules.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/nicar-2026/n...

item.title: songbogong (@songbogong.bsky.social)
item.description: At least 2 NICAR ians have their flight to Indianapolis cancelled due to heavy rain at Dallas, Texas. I’m really glad to stay overnight at an airport for the first time!!!

item.title: Jon Schleuss (@jschleuss.com)
item.description: Excited to be in Indianapolis for #NICAR26 !!!

item.title: Tristan Lee (@tristanl.ee)
item.description:
I'll be at #NICAR26 this weekend, speaking at the sessions:
"Introduction to network visualization and analysis" Thursday @ 2:30pm "How to investigate Telegram" Friday @ 10:15am "Using open-source intelligence (OSINT) in investigations" Saturday @ 10:15am
DM me if you want to meet up!

item.title: Andrea Suozzo (@andreasuozzo.com)
item.description:
Hey #NICAR26: Have you ever wanted to report on maternal or infant health but weren't sure where to start?
Tomorrow at 10:15am, @sophiechou.bsky.social, @hollyhacker.bsky.social and I will run you through tons of story examples and dataset ideas that we hope will spark your next story!

item.title: Steven Rich (@datab.ae)
item.description: and session 3 is lightning talks! at 5:15 on Friday. I’ll be speaking about how while using data has made my career, it has nearly killed me. And yes, I mean that literally. #NICAR26

item.title: Steven Rich (@datab.ae)
item.description: session 2 is on Friday at 3:45pm on the art of the data FOIA. #NICAR26

item.title: Steven Rich (@datab.ae)
item.description: session 1 is tomorrow morning at 9am and is an introduction to the command line on Mac. #NICAR26

item.title: Steven Rich (@datab.ae)
item.description: I am en route to Indianapolis for #NICAR26 and am so excited to connect with all the nerds. I’m speaking at three sessions this year and I hope of you’re in attendance, you’ll consider joining me at them.

item.title: Rob Wells (@robwells.bsky.social)
item.description: Come on by my #NICAR2026 talk Thursday with Tiasia Saunders about narrative analysis in R. schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

item.title: Washington Post Data Team (@wpdatateam.bsky.social)
item.description:
We're en route to #NICAR26. Come find us in Indy!
Friday: - 9 am: @jeremybmerrill.com demos how to find things with A.I. outside of chatbots - 11:30 am: @meghanhoyer.bsky.social on fact-checking AI-assisted reporting in the newsroom - also 11:30 am: @jeremybmerrill.com on investigating crypto
📊

item.title: j soma (@dangerscarf.bsky.social)
item.description: Here we go #NICAR26, a zillion and one sessions on the docket! Thurs: No-code AI pipelines with n8n Fri: Analyzing images/video with AI + Wrangling PDFs with Natural PDF Sat: Browser automation with Playwright + Ethical AI in Investigations Sun: Build your own AI Benchmark

item.title: C.J. Robinson (@cj-robinson.bsky.social)
item.description: speaking at two #NICAR26 sessions with some wonderful @towcenter.bsky.social colleagues! come say hi!

item.title: Andy Larsen (@andyblarsen.bsky.social)
item.description:
I’m headed to a conference about data journalism today #NICAR26 and legitimately just very excited to learn new things
One thing I think sports journalism doesn’t do well is professional development… there are not very many structured learning chances once you have a job IMO

item.title: Daniel J. Willis (@bayareadata.press)
item.description: There’s an upgrade request for a D. Willis and I’m going to #NICAR26 so history suggests it’s @dwillis.bsky.social pretending to be me again.

item.title: Christian McDonald (@crit.bsky.social)
item.description: Landed in Indy with some @innovationut.bsky.social fellows on our way to #NICAR26. Saw folks from the @texastribune.org and @kxan.com also repping Texas news orgs … It’s time to learn!

item.title: Robert Simmon (@rsimmon.bsky.social)
item.description:
Can someone remind me when abstract submissions for the next NICAR open? Every year I think I should submit a talk, and every year I forget. 🙃
#NICAR26

item.title: Brad Skillman (@bradqskillman.bsky.social)
item.description: On the road to #nicar26. Chilling out now watching Red Sox-Yankees (alternating with checking FlightAware to see how much my trip from LGA might be delayed). Looking forward to catching up with old and new friends and seeing how AI is affecting your work for better or worse.

item.title: Washington Post Data Team (@wpdatateam.bsky.social)
item.description:
Here, we’ll share even more stories, methodologies, datasets we're looking at, tools we like, and the occasional rant about color-coded spreadsheets.
A bunch of us are at NICAR next week, so expect some live threads from sessions and hallway dispatches. If you're going, come find us! #NICAR26

item.title: Brian C. Keegan, Ph.D. at NICAR26 (@brianckeegan.com)
item.description:
On my way to #NICAR26!
I’m looking forward to learning about leveraging emerging AI capabilities to support public interest values.
www.ire.org/training/con...

item.title: Mike Reilley (@mikereilley.bsky.social)
item.description:
If you are at #nicar26 in Indy, come by my session tomorrow morning, "AI Tools That Won't Get You Fired"
We'll break all kinds of stuff ...

item.title: MuckRock (@muckrock.com)
item.description: Will you be attending #NICAR26? MuckRock staff will be hosting sessions throughout the weekend. Check out the upcoming panels in this thread and say hi! 👋

item.title: J. Emory Parker 🏳️‍🌈 (@jaspar.bsky.social)
item.description: Headed to Indianapolis for NICAR!

item.title: Daniel J. Willis (@bayareadata.press)
item.description: It is so incredibly early. You better be worth it, #NICAR26.

item.title: Mike Reilley (@mikereilley.bsky.social)
item.description:
If you are at #nicar26 in Indy, come by my session tomorrow morning, "AI Tools That Won't Get You Fired".
We'll break all kinds of stuff ...

item.title: Alex Garcia (@alexgarcia.xyz)
item.description: I will be at #NICAR26 this week teaching classes! For campaign finance folks: come to my Thursday 11:30am class on libfec, a new fast CLI tool for working with FEC data! Also get limited-edition libfec stickers + a campfin "zine"! (Bonus: find @simonwillison.net and I for Datasette stickers)

item.title: Jim Daley (@jimdaleywrites.bsky.social)
item.description: On Thursday I’ll be on a panel at #NICAR26 to talk about how I used FOIA to obtain records from municipal agencies that shed light on federal immigration raids, as well as the collaboration of Chicago journos that used OSINT to investigate feds’ use of tear gas. (Stories in thread)

item.title: brentajones.bsky.social (@brentajones.bsky.social)
item.description: Heading to #NICAR26 on Thursday! Looking forward to sharing some knowledge, learning a new stuff and getting recharged and reinspired. Want to talk tools, process, public media (or whatever)? Come find me! Also made a bunch of these for anyone who wants one.

item.title: Tyler Machado (@tylermachado.com)
item.description:
Taking off for #NICAR26 in Indy soon! Come find me if you want to talk about frontend tech, data graphics, design systems, CMS hopes and dreams...
Also, I spun up a music festival grid-styled look at the schedule, if this is helpful for anyone besides me: www.tylermachado.com/nicar-schedu...

item.title: Reporters Committee for Freedom of the Press (@rcfp.org)
Derek Willis (@dwillis.bsky.social)
item.description: If you'll be around on Sunday morning there's a NICAR-L session where we can explore this!

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description:
And if you need more incentive to go to this session, yes, we'll be providing some kind of goodies.
That's all I'm saying.
#NICAR26 #Accessibility #AltText
schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

item.title: Jon Keegan (@jonkeegan.com)
item.description:
Really looking forward to attending this week’s @ire.org NICAR conference in Indianapolis! 🏎️🏁
I’ll be doing a panel with Libby Seline and Ryan Serpico where we dive into some of the AI concepts that journalists should know, and share some tips for reporting on AI. schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

item.title: Emilia Ruzicka (@emiliaruzicka.bsky.social)
item.description: This is a great way to make sure your social posts are accessible! And if you don’t know how to write alt text, join @stacykess.bsky.social and I for our “Implementing Accessibility” session at #NICAR26 on Friday!

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Can data storytelling reach audiences who distrust established science? In this #NICAR26 session, panelists share innovative approaches to presenting data in ways that engage, persuade and build trust. With: Eva Constantaras, Aaron Mendelson, Max Siegelbaum, Ariana Beedie

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Attend the "State secrets: a workflow for using state-level ethics disclosure data in your reporting" session at #NICAR26. Journalists Audrey Nielsen and Diara Townes will demo two states’ systems, share collaborative datasets + a 2026 tipsheet.

item.title: Patrick Garvin (@patrickmgarvin.bsky.social)
item.description:
This week, @ire.org has its annual NICAR conference. If you struggle to remember to add alt text to your images, Bluesky has a setting that will remind you. Go to "Settings," then "Accessibility." Select the checkbox for "Require alt text before posting."
#NICAR26 #NICAR2026

item.title: Derek Willis (@dwillis.bsky.social)
item.description:
If you're coming to #NICAR2026 this week, I've got a few sessions for you:
* Demoing the new IRE Resources Center with @palewi.re (Thu) * Using LLMs to improve your archives (Sat) * Tips for election coverage (Sat)
Will also be at the NICAR-L session on Sunday morning with some work.
Come along!

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: For fun (I'm retired 😅) I worked with Claude to do this in R to also get an RSS feed. Data currently updates hourly but I'll try to ⬆️ frequency during #NICAR26. Web page: smach.github.io/nicar-bluesk... RSS feed: raw.githubusercontent.com/smach/nicar-... R code: github.com/smach/nicar-...

item.title: Mike Reilley (@mikereilley.bsky.social)
item.description: Busy week: I'll be speaking at the CMA conference in NYC on Wednesday morning and #NICAR26 in Indianapolis on Thursday morning. If you're at either conference, stop by and say hello.

item.title: J. Emory Parker 🏳️‍🌈 (@jaspar.bsky.social)
item.description: Hmu if you’re going to NICAR this year

item.title: Tejal Wakchoure (@tejaldehyde.bsky.social)
item.description: I'm moderating a panel at NICAR this week! Come hear @allanlasser.com, @elizabethrenter.bsky.social, @arlenemartinez.bsky.social and I talk about careers and finding your niche in news or news-adjacent roles. Stop by, say hi and bring your questions! schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

item.title: Christian McDonald (@crit.bsky.social)
item.description: If you are in Indy and want to learn about a really nifty data cleaning tool OpenRefine, take my hands-on #NICAR26 session on Saturday morning! schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

item.title: Christian McDonald (@crit.bsky.social)
item.description: I'm headed to #NICAR26 this week with a bunch of @innovationut.bsky.social students so we can learn about more tools and stories to tell using data and other tech. So ... I may do more posting than ... well, almost none. We gonna get nerdy.

item.title: Dan Bauman (@danbauman77.bsky.social)
item.description:
SOME PERSONAL NEWS: I’m on the journalism job market again! (More below)
From business, ed, legal, breaking & investigative reporting, to data & research skills rooted in Python, R & AI — I can deliver for your newsroom. Email me at danbauman77@gmail.com & I’ll see u @ #NICAR (1/10)

item.title: Aaron Mendelson (@amendelson.bsky.social)
item.description:
If you'll be at #NICAR26 in Indy, I'm doing a few sessions.
3/5 (Thurs) @ 11:30: Using data to find sources 3/6 (Fri) @ 10:15: Demo: The Gun Violence Data Hub 3/6 (Fri) @ 11:30: Connect with skeptical and disengaged audiences ... with data!
Hope to see ya there! schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Ready to level up your election data analysis skills? Join this hands-on #NICAR26 session designed for journalists and data pros who want faster, cleaner workflows. You’ll learn through real-world data journalism examples from Eade Hemingway and Oliver Hawkins of the Financial Times.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: When should journalists use AI and when shouldn’t we? The #NICAR26 panel “How to Use AI Responsibly” brings together newsroom leaders to discuss ethics, disclosure and combining AI tools with human review.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Complex PDFs slowing you down? “How to Get Data Out of Complex PDFs Using AI” is a hands-on session at #NICAR26 on extracting key info and vetting AI outputs to power strong reporting. With: Disha Raychaudhuri (Reuters) Duy Nguyen (The New York Times) Clare Farley (Reuters)

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: Interest in posts about the NICAR data journalism conference March 5-8? This Bluesky feed collects posts with either the #NICAR26 or #NICAR2026 hashtag - plus searching for "NICAR" without a hashtag bsky.app/profile/smac... (Created with @blueskyfeedcreator.com ) #DDJ

item.title: Laura Kurtzberg 🌻 (@laurakurtzberg.bsky.social)
item.description: Reposting with hashtags! #NICAR26 #NICAR2026 Check out the start pack at bsky.app/starter-pack...

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: Alt text by gemma3:12b running on ollama: "Presentation: Running LLMs locally! Aarushee Sahejpel & Dhrumil Mehta discuss at NICAR 26 (Indianapolis, March 5-8). Thursday, 3:45-4:45pm. Featuring race track graphic & speaker headshots."

item.title: Derek Willis (@dwillis.bsky.social)
item.description: Just playing around with some NICAR-L archives:

item.title: The Word (@the-word.news)
item.description:
Our March issue comes out Thursday. This month we're talking about: • what it's like to start a #newsletter when you can't see the screen • #NICAR26 • dealing with #trauma as a journalist • and more!
Are you excited? We're excited.

item.title: Allan Lasser (@allanlasser.com)
item.description: Working on some Jupyter notebooks for #NICAR. One of my favorite ways to write and think about code.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: We’re going LIVE in 15 minutes! Join us for an Instagram Live AMA! We’re talking: ✨ How we got into journalism ✨ What we actually do ✨ #NICAR26 + #IRE26 ✨ Memberships, programming & projects 🕒 12 p.m. PT / 3 p.m. ET 📍 LIVE on IG @ire_nicar + @poynter_institute

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: [NICAR 2026 is a data journalism conference happening next week in Indianapolis #ddj ]

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: Browse, search, and filter all the NICAR 2026 posts on Bluesky R Shiny app collects all the posts with the #NICAR26 or #NICAR2026 hashtags App: apps.machlis.com/shiny/nicar2... #RStats code: github.com/smach/bskyconf #RShiny [Did this for Twitter years ago, now updated]

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: In this hands-on #NICAR26 session, you’ll learn how to run large language models like Llama, Mistral, and Gemma. This session is perfect for beginners. Led by Aarushi Sahejpal from American University and Dhrumil Mehta from Columbia University. Register for #NICAR26: https://bit.ly/4oDxQJH

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Want to build a dynamic, data-driven voter guide for your local elections? At this hands-on #NICAR26 session, Adam Marton and Jerry Zremski from the University of Maryland will show you how the Local News Network creates its signature online voter guides using SvelteKit + Datasette.

item.title: Equal Access Public Media (EAPM) (@equalaccesspublicmedia.org)
item.description: The Equal Access Public Media chief of editorial @stacykess.bsky.social is getting ready for @ire.org’s #NICAR26…

item.title: News Media Help Desk (@newsmediahelpdesk.org)
item.description: The Help Desk will be at #NICAR26 in Indianapolis! Find us in the exhibitor area, where you can pick up swag, tell us about what’s working for your news organization or tell us about a challenge your newsroom is facing. https://www.ire.org/training/conferences/nicar-2026/

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Immigration data can feel overwhelming. At #NICAR26, “Using Immigration Data to Tell Stories in Your Community” breaks it down and shows you how to turn messy data into meaningful local stories. Come ready to dig in.

item.title: Silvia Canelón (@silviacanelon.com)
item.description:
I'm thrilled to be a fellow at the #NICAR26 data journalism conference this year!
I'll also be coaching a hands-on session on #RStats data analysis + plotting using #tidyverse packages. 📊 Maybe I'll see you there! 👇🏽 schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...
#ddj @ire.org

item.title: Laura Kurtzberg 🌻 (@laurakurtzberg.bsky.social)
item.description: NICAR is next week already? I just added a bunch more speakers to the starter pack! Should be up-to-date now! Also, check out the NICAR schedule: schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026

item.title: Reponytt (@reponytt.bsky.social)
item.description:
muckrock har nettopp åpnet repoet MuckRock/NICAR: https://github.com/MuckRock/NICAR
NICAR-sesjoner av MuckRock-ansatte

item.title: Reponytt (@reponytt.bsky.social)
item.description:
ireapps har nettopp åpnet repoet ireapps/nicar-2026-local-guide: https://github.com/ireapps/nicar-2026-local-guide
En guide til lokal mat, attraksjoner og logistikk i Indianapolis for NICAR 2026-konferansen.

item.title: Ben Welsh (@palewi.re)
item.description:
RE: https://mastodon.palewi.re/@palewire/116119773803070204
"First LLM Classifier" is soooold out! #NICAR26 is ready to rip.
Fret not. You can still hit the wait list. And we will be releasing an online textbook with the full script for anyone to play at home.

item.title: Josh Hinkle (@hinklej.bsky.social)
item.description: LEARN LIKE A BOSS! Are you a news leader attending #NICAR26 in Indy next week who could use some specialized, FREE @ire.org training? Register for our “Managing Investigators” master class (featuring tips for navigating AI)! And stick around for our manager networking session after the class! (1/2)

item.title: Steven Rich (@datab.ae)
item.description: i'm so excited and terrified to announce that my lightning talk for #NICAR26 was accepted and that i'll give it next week in indianapolis. it will detail something i've struggled quietly with and kept largely private but am ready to talk more openly about. www.ire.org/2026/02/25/a...

item.title: Open Journalism Bot (@openjournalism.bsky.social)
item.description:
New open GitHub repo from IRE/NICAR!
https://github.com/ireapps/nicar-2026-local-guide

item.title: Patrick Garvin (@patrickmgarvin.bsky.social)
item.description: For any and all who will be at @ire.org's NICAR this year, please come to these sessions about accessibility! #NICAR26

item.title: Emilia Ruzicka (@emiliaruzicka.bsky.social)
item.description: Speaking aside, I’m pumped to connect with friends new and old this year at #NICAR26. I’m also still on the hunt for a full-time job, so if you or someone you know is looking for a data/investigative journalist, editor, or something related, please don’t hesitate to shoot me a message! (4/4)

item.title: Emilia Ruzicka (@emiliaruzicka.bsky.social)
item.description: I am impossibly excited to be speaking at #NICAR26 in Indianapolis! On Friday, I’ll be kicking things off with @stacykess.bsky.social and @patrickmgarvin.bsky.social for “Accessibility Basics.” We’ll give you a crash course in implementing more accessible practices in your own newsroom! (1/4)

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Are you going #NICAR26? Attend "Fun with Hypotheticals: Investigating Your Dubious Data Dilemmas in Real Time". Bring your silliest data question and watch journalists break down how they’d actually report it using real investigative methods. Submit your hypothetical: https://bit.ly/4qTpUoE

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: Ooo just spotted on GitHub: Scraping Sports Data With R "Three R notebooks with step by step instructions on how to scrape data when it's easy, when it's a little harder, and when it's the NCAA and is awful." github.com/mattwaite/ni... For a #NICAR26 #RStats workshop by @mattwaite.bsky.social

item.title: Tyler Machado (@tylermachado.com)
item.description: I'll be at #NICAR26 next week, and I am so excited to once again to be leading the "Building your first SvelteKit data app" hands-on demo. Now with more Svelte 5. But the same number of cats.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Meet the #NICAR26 Fellows! Sotiris Sideris is an investigative data journalist and educator from Athens, Greece, and a Nieman Fellow at Harvard based in Cambridge, Massachusetts. He's looking forward to learning how journalists are actually applying AI in real-world investigative reporting.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Meet the #NICAR26 Fellows! Bella Davis is an Indigenous affairs reporter at New Mexico In Depth and a proud Yurok tribal member based in Albuquerque. Her reporting focuses on critical issues affecting Native communities across New Mexico.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Meet the #NICAR26 Fellows! Jordan Gass-Pooré @jgasspoore.bsky.social is a podcast producer & investigative journalist based in NYC She is looking forward to sharpening her skills in incorporating data into audio investigations & analyzing global environmental datasets for local reporting.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Meet #NICAR26 Fellow Silvia Canelón, a data scientist and journalist based in Philadelphia. She is hoping to bring back accountability story ideas for Philly and sharpen her ability to create custom interactive data visualizations. Meet the rest of the #NICAR26 Fellows: https://bit.ly/4cAtujW

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Meet your #NICAR26 Fellows! Stacy Kess, Chief of Editorial at Equal Access Public Media, is gearing up for #NICAR26 the only way she knows how: with coffee. Lots of it. Catch Stacy and her coffee-fueled data brilliance at #NICAR26!

item.title: Karen K. Ho (@karenho.bsky.social)
item.description: This is like when I told other journalists "Anchorman" was 21 years old before my presentation at NICAR last year and they all made faces at me in reply.

item.title: Juan Pablo Garnham (@jpgarnham.bsky.social)
item.description: Are you coming to the #NICAR26 conference? Join @amondry.bsky.social and me for a conversation about how to report on housing and homelessness challenges! More info here: schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#... @ire.org

item.title: Mike Reilley (@mikereilley.bsky.social)
item.description: Anyone going to #NICAR26 in Indy next week: Swing by my Thursday 9 a.m. session, "AI Tools for Journalists". We'll focus on data and other multimedia tools. Two-hour, hands-on session. Good fun. Tools, exercises to take with you. Good fun.

item.title: Jill Castellano (@jillcastellano.bsky.social)
item.description: Catch me at the #NICAR26 data journalism conference next week!

item.title: Lucia Walinchus (@walinchus.bsky.social)
item.description:
4/8 Next, pull in the schedule:
NICAR2026 <- rio::import("https://ire-nicar-conference-schedules.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/nicar-2026/nicar-2026-schedule.json")
Make a dataframe of all the speakers:
speakers <- NICAR2026$speakers
And get their socials:
socials <- speakers$social

item.title: Lucia Walinchus (@walinchus.bsky.social)
item.description:
1/8 So you're excited to go to the @ire.org 2026 NICAR data journalism conference!
And you want to follow all the speakers online. This tutorial will show you how do this quickly with #Rstats and @bsky.app.
schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#/

item.title: Emily Hopkins is at #NICAR26 (@emilyhopkins.bsky.social)
item.description: Can't believe #NICAR26 is next week! Excited to see Indy crawling with data nerds. 😎

item.title: Equal Access Public Media (EAPM) (@equalaccesspublicmedia.org)
item.description: So proud of our founder and chief of editorial @stacykess.bsky.social, one of the 19 fantastic #NICAR26 Fellows!

item.title: Logan Finney 🗒️ (@loganfinney.com)
item.description: Thank you #NICAR for the skills that made this 330+ row Flourish monstrosity possible. @ire.org

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: We’re proud to share that IRE is sponsoring 19 fellowships for journalists attending #NICAR26 in Indianapolis on March 5–8. All fellows meet IRE’s membership standards, engaging substantially in news gathering, production, research or journalism education. Read more here: https://bit.ly/4cAtujW

item.title: Reponytt (@reponytt.bsky.social)
item.description:
ireapps har nettopp åpnet repoet ireapps/nicar-2026-dining: https://github.com/ireapps/nicar-2026-dining
En guide til alle de beste spisestedene på NICAR 2026 i Indianapolis.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: A new Quick Hits newsletter from Investigative Reporters and Editors is out! Inside: - A Worldwide Virtual IRE Meetup - NICAR26 updates - $10K reporting grants - Award nominations - IRE26 early-bird deadline Check your inbox. Subscribe: https://www.ire.org/newsletters/

item.title: Open Journalism Bot (@openjournalism.bsky.social)
item.description:
New open GitHub repo from IRE/NICAR!
https://github.com/ireapps/nicar-2026-dining

item.title: Reponytt (@reponytt.bsky.social)
item.description: ireapps har nettopp åpnet repoet ireapps/NICAR26-Intro-to-R: https://github.com/ireapps/NICAR26-Intro-to-R

item.title: Open Journalism Bot (@openjournalism.bsky.social)
item.description:
New open GitHub repo from IRE/NICAR!
I think this is an empty repo.
https://github.com/ireapps/NICAR26-Intro-to-R

item.title: Forest Gregg (@bunkum.us)
item.description: it's like early 2010s NICAR

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: #NICAR26 has several pre-registration workshops that go deep into data analysis, coding, scraping and investigative techniques. Register now and secure your seat: https://www.ire.org/training/conferences/nicar-2026/

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description:
But wait, #NICAR26! There's more! After Accessibility Basics is the all new Implementing Accessibility hands-on session. Great for: • learning how to write alt text. • a refresher on how to use alt text. • practicing your alt text chops. • scoring goodies.
schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#... 2/

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description:
With @ire.org #NICAR26 on the brain (because I'm putting the polishing touch on the presentations), I want to remind you that you definitely want to be there for Accessibility Basics. Come for the data, stay for the digital accessibility-Star Wars tie-in.
schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...
1/

item.title: Ben Welsh (@palewi.re)
item.description:
🤓 Coming to #NICAR26? Looking for things to do?
Join Scott Klein and me for a free dinner on Wed. night! OpenNews is hosting a discussion of our recent story on the state of open-source in journalism.
The full menu of community meals is at […]

item.title: Tara Puckey (@tpuckey.bsky.social)
item.description: Really looking forward to speaking at @ire.org's NICAR Conference next month. We'll be talking about better teams (my favorite) and generally working better with other humans (necessary, IMO). 👯 Relationships are the most important piece Will I see you there?

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description:
Heading to Indy for #NICAR26?
Sign up for a 20-min one-on-one session with a manager or newsroom leader with expertise.
#NICAR26 Office Hours will be held on Saturday, March 7 from 10:15-12:30 PM ET in Room 208: https://bit.ly/3MsiZEP
Sign up before Feb. 20.

item.title: Oli Hawkins (@olihawkins.com)
item.description:
If you're a data journalist using Python and you are going to be at NICAR, we are running an introduction to Polars workshop.
schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#... bsky.app/profile/emil...

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: If you’re joining us for #NICAR26 in March and hoping to get (or give!) one-on-one guidance, the deadline to sign up for the mentorship program is TODAY, Friday, Feb. 13 at 11:59 P.M. ET. It's one of the most meaningful parts of the conference. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/4rJjGZc

item.title: Karen K. Ho (@karenho.bsky.social)
item.description: My hesitancy to attend NICAR in Minneapolis next month is part of a wider trend of Canadians avoiding travel the US for multiple years: www.usatoday.com/story/travel...

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description:
Hey #NICAR26! We're putting together a hands-on session you all know you want and need called Implementing Accessibility.
It focuses on Alt Text best practices, and how to do it for photos, graphics, maps, and more. We'll give you practice plus some goodies!
#AltText @ire.org

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description:
Are you heading to @ire.org #NICAR26? Looking for a job? Sign up for a 1-on-1 feedback or career advice session with a manager!
Bring your resume, a clip, or a career question and we'll match you with an expert. (Possibly me.)
Sign up: forms.gle/o2mCuhWvBa4R.... We have about 50 slots left!

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description:
March is conference month!
I'll be talking about #AccessibilityBasics and teaching how to implement #Accessibility at @ire.org's #NICAR26 in Indy. Then I'll head to Detroit to talk about #AccessibleCommuniction at #NTC26 (Nonprofit Tech Conference), representing @equalaccesspublicmedia.org.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description:
It's now time to vote for your favorite #NICAR26 t-shirt designs! You have until 11:59 p.m. on Feb. 13 to vote.
Click here to vote: https://bit.ly/4cli8A8

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Voting for #NICAR26 Lightning Talks is now open! Lightning Talks are fast, 5-minute presentations focused on practical skills, tools and techniques. Voting is open now and closes Feb. 20. The selected talks will be presented Friday, March 6 at #NICAR26. Have your say: https://bit.ly/4qrmZDa

item.title: Emilia Ruzicka (@emiliaruzicka.bsky.social)
item.description: Can’t wait to join @stacykess.bsky.social and @patrickmgarvin.bsky.social to present #AccessibilityBasics and #ImplementingAccessibility at #NICAR26! If you’ll be there, come join us!!

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description:
By the way, NICAR is my favorite journalism conference of the year.
And it's not just all the data nerds and free coffee.
I swear.
(But the free coffee and being around a bunch of people who totally get me helps.)

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description: It is less than a month until #NICAR26, and I'm headed back to Indianapolis to teach #AccessibilityBasics with my two favorite people @emiliaruzicka.bsky.social and @patrickmgarvin.bsky.social. But wait! There's more! Stick around for the new hands-on #ImplementingAccessibility session!

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Have questions about NICAR26 or other upcoming IRE events? Join IRE President @hinklej.bsky.social, Executive Director @ddfonline.bsky.social and Training Director Laura Moscoso for virtual office hours this Wednesday, Feb. 11 at 1 PM ET. Register now: https://bit.ly/4kq5aDl

item.title: The Word (@the-word.news)
item.description:
Reporter Hashim Quraishi is preparing a big preview of #NICAR26.
And Akinyele Michael will have some great columns in store for you!
If you have news to send us for the March edition, or you know a source (or a source) for one of these articles, email editor@the-word.news.
3/

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description:
IRE Board President @hinklej.bsky.social explains why IRE’s 2026 conference season is so critical — and how NICAR26 (March 5–8 in Indianapolis) will help journalists sharpen their reporting, storytelling and data skills.
Learn more and sign up: https://bit.ly/4oDxQJH

item.title: Ben Welsh (@palewi.re)
item.description:
Want to talk more about it? If you're attending the upcoming #NICAR26 conference in Indianapolis, you should join us for the OpenNews dinner we're sponsoring.
More details soon. DM me if you want in.

item.title: Diana Fuentes (@ddfonline.bsky.social)
item.description: Your concerns are real, of course, Karen. There are no easy answers for safety issues. We do have lower rates for NICAR26 for unemployed members; email info@ire.org for details. If you can’t attend NICAR26, I hope you’ll consider attending AccessFest in October; same great training, all online.

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: Conference app chatbot built in R that: - Answers schedule questions - Includes both chatbot and searchable table - One-click button filters table to see only sessions AI bot mentions Code: github.com/smach/NICAR2... App: smach-nicar2026-chatbot.share.connect.posit.cloud #RStats #RShiny #NICAR26

item.title: Diana Fuentes (@ddfonline.bsky.social)
item.description: Sorry for delay in replying, Karen. And about your situation. I wish everyone could be @NICAR26. It’s our homecoming; IRE’s first confab was in Indy in 1976. Like now, journalists were under attack. It’s so much worse. But we can’t let them stop us from holding the powerful to account.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: ⚡ DEADLINE ALERT ⚡ Submit your #NICAR26 Lightning Talk pitch by tonight at 11:59 p.m. ET (Feb. 8): https://bit.ly/4kpI53I 5-minute talks • anonymous submissions • attendee voting Voting opens Feb. 9. Talks take place March 6 at #NICAR26 in Indianapolis. Pitch it while you still can.

item.title: Josh Hinkle (@hinklej.bsky.social)
item.description: Join us at #NICAR26! -Conference Registration: tinyurl.com/38p7d556 -Management Master Class: tinyurl.com/dfbbptzw -Manager Networking: tinyurl.com/4rxj6sz8 @ire.org

item.title: Josh Hinkle (@hinklej.bsky.social)
item.description: Headed to #NICAR26 next month in Indy? Know a news leader who could use this specialized, FREE training? Join our “Managing Investigators” master class (with tips for navigating AI)! Stick around for our manager networking session, too! Links in the 🧵! @ire.org @ecg.bsky.social @justinmyers.net

item.title: Karen K. Ho (@karenho.bsky.social)
item.description: it is not fun to realize I should probably not attend the NICAR conference next month in Indianapolis for safety and financial reasons

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: The #NICAR26 T-Shirt Contest deadline is approaching! If you’ve ever had a clever data-journalism T-shirt idea, now’s the time. - Submit your design - Community voting - Bragging rights For more guidelines: https://bit.ly/4qhrcJE Deadline: Friday, Feb. 6. Email the design to conference@ire.org

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: The #NICAR26 T-Shirt Contest deadline is approaching! If you’ve ever had a clever data-journalism T-shirt idea, now’s the time. - Submit your design - Community voting - Bragging rights For more guidelines: https://bit.ly/4qhrcJE Deadline: Friday, Feb. 6. Email the design to conference@ire.org

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Still thinking about NICAR? This is your sign. #NICAR26 is a true homecoming for IRE. 2026 marks 50 years since our first conference in Indianapolis. Get your hotel discount at the JW Marriott by Feb. 9. Don’t wait — register now. https://www.ire.org/training/conferences/nicar-2026/

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: The #NICAR26 T-Shirt Contest deadline is approaching! If you’ve ever had a clever data-journalism T-shirt idea, now’s the time. - Submit your design - Community voting - Bragging rights For more guidelines: https://bit.ly/4qhrcJE Deadline: Friday, Feb. 6. Email the design to conference@ire.org

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: We look forward to recognizing the winners at the upcoming NICAR Conference in Indianapolis! Learn more about the 2025 Philip Meyer Journalism Award winners and read their stories here: bit.ly/3Zhz7f7

item.title: Sophie Chou (@sophiechou.bsky.social)
item.description: Proud to share that @andreasuozzo.com and I received second place in @ire.org’s Philip Meyer Award for our data reporting in “Life of the Mother,” which quantified the impact of Texas’s abortion ban on pregnancy loss ❤️💔 we will be at #nicar26 next month hosting a panel on maternal health reporting!

item.title: 2rZiKKbOU3nTafniR2qMMSE0gwZ (@2rzikkbou3ntafnir2qmmse0gwz.activitypub.awakari.com.ap.brid.gy)
item.description:
It’s time for the NICAR 2026 T-shirt contest! IRE announces winners of the 2025 Philip Meyer Journalism Award Earn bragging rights and help raise money for future training events by participating...
#IRE #News #Uncategorized #nicar26
Origin | Interest | Match

item.title: 2rZiKKbOU3nTafniR2qMMSE0gwZ (@2rzikkbou3ntafnir2qmmse0gwz.activitypub.awakari.com.ap.brid.gy)
item.description:
Sign up for the NICAR26 mentorship program Promotions and new staff strengthen IRE (January 27, 2026) — IRE is now accepting applications for the NICAR26 mentorship program! Our annual data journ...
#IRE #News #Uncategorized
Origin | Interest | Match

item.title: Oli Hawkins (@olihawkins.com)
item.description: Looks like me and @eadehemingway.bsky.social are going to be running a workshop on data analysis with @pola.rs at NICAR in March. Maybe see some of you there!

item.title: Allan Lasser (@allanlasser.com)
item.description: I’m excited to have NICAR 2026 happening in my backyard! Let me know if you’re looking for things to do, eat, or see around Indy

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description:
Ooh! Look at this nifty bunch!
Are you ready? #NICAR26
go.bsky.app/H7iUZYd

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description:
Start your engines, journalists. The NICAR conference is heading to Indianapolis this March.
If your reporting relies on data, #NICAR26 is the premier conference for you.
Early-bird registration for #NICAR26 ends on Friday, Jan. 30.
Register here: https://bit.ly/4oDxQJH

item.title: Karen K. Ho (@karenho.bsky.social)
item.description: I don't know how I would do it, but I think it would be funny to pitch a lightning talk about Heated Rivalry for NICAR, the investigative journalism conference focused on data reporting

item.title: Laura Kurtzberg 🌻 (@laurakurtzberg.bsky.social)
item.description: I am so looking forward to being around this community of data journalists. If you are a NICAR speaker and I missed you, please DM me so I can add you to this starter pack! go.bsky.app/H7iUZYd

item.title: sandra fish (@fishnette.bsky.social)
item.description: Hey, data journos, still time to get discounted rates for NICAR in Indianapolis! Check out the program and all the deets here:

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: The early bird deadline for NICAR26 has been extended to Jan 30, 2026! The cutoff for the hotel rate is Feb 9, 2026. Register now: https://bit.ly/4oDxQJH

item.title: 2rZiKKbOU3nTafniR2qMMSE0gwZ (@2rzikkbou3ntafnir2qmmse0gwz.activitypub.awakari.com.ap.brid.gy)
item.description:
It’s time for the NICAR 2026 T-shirt contest! It's time for the NICAR 2026 T-shirt contest! Earn bragging rights and help raise money for future training events by participating in the NICAR ...
#IRE #News #Uncategorized #nicar26
Origin | Interest | Match

item.title: 2rZiKKbOU3nTafniR2qMMSE0gwZ (@2rzikkbou3ntafnir2qmmse0gwz.activitypub.awakari.com.ap.brid.gy)
item.description:
It’s time for the NICAR 2026 T-shirt contest! It's time for the NICAR 2026 T-shirt contest! Earn bragging rights and help raise money for future training events by participating in the NICAR ...
#IRE #News #Uncategorized #nicar26
Origin | Interest | Match

item.title: Ben Welsh (@palewi.re)
item.description: Starting Saturday at 9, we'll work through "Go Big with GitHub Actions," a hands-on class that debuted at the last NICAR data journalism conference. https://palewi.re/docs/go-big-with-github-actions/ You should come! There will be bagels.

item.title: Josh Hinkle (@hinklej.bsky.social)
item.description: Ask us anything (virtually) on Wednesday at Noon CST/1p ET! We’re ready to answer your questions about #NICAR26, the @ire.org Awards and more! Members can register here: bit.ly/49SOQak #IREforAll

item.title: Josh Hinkle (@hinklej.bsky.social)
item.description: This month, @ire.org is focused on getting you ready for #NICAR26! Our annual data journalism conference heads to Indianapolis March 5-8. Learn more in my latest President’s Message: bit.ly/4aXRo8q #IREforAll

item.title: Karen K. Ho (@karenho.bsky.social)
item.description: I am finally going to pitch all the NICAR sessions I wish other people would present like "Useful datasets for non-American journalists", "Intro to no-code data analysis using only Excel or Google Sheets" and "How to buy nice clothes on Goodwill Auctions when you don't make a lot of money."

item.title: Derek Willis (@dwillis.bsky.social)
item.description: Paging my #NICAR pals:

item.title: Simon Willison (@simonwillison.net)
item.description: Are you coming to NICAR? I had a session accepted on using coding agent skills for exactly this kind of thing!

item.title: Derek Willis (@dwillis.bsky.social)
item.description:
To my NICAR pals:
I found a Caspio site.
Only a few of you will know what this means, but I had to tell someone.

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description:
I'm leading an Accessibility Basics (sort of an Accessibility Basics II, if you will) panel in March for @ire.org #NICAR26. With it leaning ever more into movie references, one thing is for certain.
I need a pyrotechnics display to pull this whole thing off properly.
Just saying...
